race.comment: DUCK EGG BLUE (6) resumes with excellent fresh credentials. Expected to go on with it this prep and won't know herself first-up with Stanley's claim. Placed at this course last prep and the two trials have had merit. Go close. SPICE BABY (12) sharp filly who comes out of a very strong contest after finishing a narrow third over 1200m at Randwick in BM78 class. Looks set for a good prep and will take catching. JAEGERS (11) deep into the prep and likely to go forward again with Roper's claim. Knocked up late after going out quickly when fifth over 1300m at Randwick Kensington. Fitter now and has each way prospects. SMASHING TIME (4) gripped on strongly first-up with a narrow second over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Comes to hand quickly and the blinkers go on. Respect. PRESIDES (3) improving gelding back in good order. Keep safe. The chances don't end there.
